name: Goblin
traits: Nimble Escape: can take the Dash or Disengage action to leave combat without provoking opportunity attacks
tactics: Cowardly and slippery. Opens by lunging at the nearest target. Once HP drops to half (≤3) or below it wants to open up the distance, harass with the shortbow, or just Nimble Escape into the woods. When surrounded by all three it goes for the weakest, Merrin.
